name: Pyromancer

recommended.why: Knight Gear increases Attack, HP and Skill Damage, greatly improving Pyromancer's powerful area-of-effect abilities and allowing her to eliminate enemy teams more quickly.

alternative.why: A strong alternative for players focusing on raw Attack and direct damage output before obtaining a full Knight set.

investment.why: Pyromancer is one of the strongest Legendary damage dealers in Top Heroes and remains valuable well into the late game. Her exceptional area damage makes her a core hero for League teams until Mythic heroes become fully developed, and she continues to perform well in many end-game lineups.

description: Pyromancer is a Legendary League damage dealer specializing in devastating area-of-effect magic attacks. She excels at clearing enemy teams quickly and provides outstanding damage throughout the early, mid and late game, making her one of the best long-term Legendary investments available.
